data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement that 'Providers submit bids (price + availability)', but there is no evidence provided that directly demonstrates this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where providers bid, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the actual submission of bids by providers. This lack of concrete evidence leads to a gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming that providers can submit bids.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
